complaints.message:
Confirm reasonable bounding box size:
88.79cm, 1.00m, 1.55m
Make sure these sizes are within the same order of magnitude you expect from this object IRL.

Confirm object properties:
- dustyable
- stainable
- toggleable
Full list of iGibson abilities: burnable, cleaningTool, coldSource, cookable, dustyable, freezable, heatSource, liquid, openable, sliceable, slicer, soakable, stainable, toggleable, waterSource
Check incorrect or missing properties, especially liquid property

ABILITIES: Confirm that this object can support all of the abilities seen below.

Abilities to evaluate (subset of all abilities): 
    cloth: False
    coldSource: False
    fillable: True
    heatSource: True
    openable: False
    particleApplier: False
    particleRemover: False
    particleSink: False
    particleSource: False
    toggleable: True

If this object looks like it should have some of these abilities flipped, please
list the abilities that we should flip for this object as a comma separated list.
For example, for an unopenable window you would put in 'openable'.

CATEGORY: Confirm object category assignment.

Object assigned to category: coffee_maker

If the object is not compatible with the rest of the objects in this category,
(e.g. tabletop sink vs regular sink), change the category here.
Confirm that the object is the same kind of object as the rest of the objects
in this category.

If the category is wrong, please type in the correct category.

APPEARANCE: Confirm object visual appearance.
Requirements:
- make sure the object has a valid texture or appearance (e.g., texture not black,
       transparency rendered correctly, etc).
- make sure any glass parts are transparent (would this object contain glass? e.g.
       wall pictures, clocks, etc. - anything wrong)
- compare the object against the 3ds Max image that should open up now.
complaints.complaint: the coffee maker part is all black. 3dsmax shows red
